title: Commentary on the Yijing: Principle and Material Force
description: Cheng Yi distinguishes principle (li) from material force (qi) — the foundation of Neo-Confucian metaphysics.
introduction: Cheng Yi distinguishes principle (li) from material force (qi) — the foundation of Neo-Confucian metaphysics.

translation.text: Principle is one but its manifestations are many. This is the Way of Heaven and Earth.
